audit_items.proof_trace: All allocations within register_resource() are transferred to Context member vectors before the sole throw site (L295): res.contents/srcmap → resources (L257), Sass_Import struct → import_stack (L272), abs_path copy → strings (L278). The Context destructor (context.cpp:117-136) exhaustively frees all three vectors including sass_delete_import for each remaining import_stack entry. No allocation escapes tracking and no double-free occurs because sass_import_take_source() zeroes import->source before sass_delete_import runs.
